reasoning.typography: Generic sans-serif system, zero typographic character. The wordmark is bold condensed caps but body copy appears to be standard weight with no distinctive voice or rhythm.
reasoning.hierarchy: Catastrophic failure — the homepage is a blank void with only a nav bar. No dominant element, no headline doing visual work, nothing for the eye to land on.
reasoning.distinctiveness: Completely generic VC stencil. 'ABOUT / TEAM / COMPANIES' nav could be literally any fund. The tagline 'products we love by creators we admire' is interchangeable boilerplate.
reasoning.color: Monochrome black/white with good restraint, though the nearly-invisible pale text ('We are a community...') shows poor contrast judgment. At least it's not busy.
reasoning.density: The homepage is almost entirely empty whitespace — not confident minimalism but rather content vacancy. Navigation alone doesn't constitute density strategy.
reasoning.voice: Textbook VC stencil IA: About/Team/Companies. Zero narrative structure, zero reflection of actual investment thesis or story. Could be any fund's wireframe.

winning_patterns: Clean monochrome palette shows some restraint
Strong logo/wordmark lockup in header has presence
Not over-designed or decorative — errs toward simplicity
anti_patterns: Homepage is essentially blank — catastrophic hierarchy failure
Generic VC navigation triad (About/Team/Companies) with zero personality
Pale ghost text is nearly illegible — accessibility fail
Could swap 'Spark Capital' for any fund name and nothing would feel wrong
No content density strategy — just void with nav
Zero typographic voice beyond bold caps wordmark
